name: Schiaparelli
tagline: ExoMars precursor; lessons fed Rosalind Franklin
description: ESA’s 2016 ExoMars demonstrator that crashed during landing — a faulty IMU saturated, triggering an early parachute deploy and engine cutoff. Lessons fed directly into the Rosalind Franklin lander design.
best_known_for: ExoMars precursor; lessons fed Rosalind Franklin
